svg.text: Case A — distress clears, full 20 min elapses, post buffer sent
Case B — second distress fires BEFORE 20 min elapses (your rule: skip post send)
Case C — what happens to the pre-buffer when distress 2 fires in Case B?
The cruise buffer has been collecting since distress 1 cleared. At distress 2, it holds up to 20 min of frames since t1.
This partial buffer IS flushed as the pre-buffer for distress 2 (even if < 20 min of data).

g.text: Send post-buffer ONLY if 20 min elapsed since distress cleared without new distress interrupting.

svg.text: Ts = per-signal (your answer) — what this means exactly
Cruise entry — only altitude (your answer): confirmed single-condition

g.text: CRUISE when: altitude_ft > 25,000 ft for 5 consecutive frames
VS and airspeed checks removed — altitude alone is the gate
